columns.name: DATO
columns.description: Date of the transaction or document

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Department number where the order is processed

columns.name: FOMR
columns.description: Type or form of document

columns.name: PRODUKT_VISMA
columns.description: Product code used in Visma system

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: File number for the document or transaction

columns.name: BILAGSNUMMER
columns.description: Unique number for the document

columns.name: BILAGSDATO
columns.description: Date of the document

columns.name: VALUTERINGSDATO
columns.description: Date for valuation or currency conversion

columns.name: BILAGSART
columns.description: Type of document or transaction

columns.name: BILAGSTEKST
columns.description: Text description for the document or transaction

columns.name: DEBET_KONTONR
columns.description: Number of the account that is debited in this transaction

columns.name: KREDIT_KONTONR
columns.description: Number of the account that is credited in this transaction

columns.name: AVGIFTSKODE
columns.description: Code for tax applicable to this transaction

columns.name: VALUTAKODE
columns.description: Code of the currency used in this transaction

columns.name: VALUTAKURS
columns.description: Exchange rate for the currency conversion

columns.name: BELOP_I_VALUTA
columns.description: Amount of the transaction in the specified currency

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: Total amount of the document or transaction

columns.name: FAKTURANR
columns.description: Unique invoice number for this transaction

columns.name: FORFALLSDATO
columns.description: Date when the payment is due or expected

columns.name: PROSJEKT_AKTIVITET
columns.description: Description of project activity related to this transaction (01.07.2016)

columns.name: ANSATT
columns.description: Employee number responsible for the order or document

columns.name: INNKJOP_ORDRENR
columns.description: Number of the purchase order related to this transaction (22.11.2021/01.12.2021)

columns.name: ENHETSNR
columns.description: Identifier of the unit where the product is stored or used

columns.name: LEVAVD
columns.description: Lead time in days for this transaction (01.07.2016)

columns.name: FILTYPE
columns.description: Type of file or document format used (01.07.2016)

columns.name: PERIODISER_K_KTONR
columns.description: Key for periodization or grouping of transactions

columns.name: REFERANSENR
columns.description: External reference number (01.07.2016)

columns.name: ORDRENR
columns.description: Unique order identifier (01.07.2016)

columns.name: VLINJENR
columns.description: Sequence number of the line item in a document or transaction

columns.name: ORDREKL
columns.description: Description of the order (01.07.2016)

columns.name: ORDRETYPE
columns.description: Type or category of the order

columns.name: FAKTTKODE
columns.description: Code related to invoice generation (01.07.2016)

columns.name: SALGSKONSULENT
columns.description: Number of the sales consultant responsible for the transaction (01.07.2016)

columns.name: MEKANIKER
columns.description: Number or description related to mechanics involved in the transaction (01.07.2016)

columns.name: MOTTAKER
columns.description: Recipient of the document or service

columns.name: MOTTAKERPOSTNR
columns.description: Postal number of the recipient (01.07.2016)

columns.name: MOTTAKER_KOMMUNE
columns.description: Commuinne where the recipient is located

columns.name: BETBET
columns.description: Code for payment method used in this transaction (01.07.2016)

columns.name: BETFORM
columns.description: Form of the payment method or additional information about it (01.07.2016)

columns.name: KONTOKODE
columns.description: Code for the account used in this transaction

columns.name: KUNDENR
columns.description: Unique number of the customer (01.07.2016)

columns.name: KUNDEPOSTNR
columns.description: Postal number of the customer (01.07.2016)

columns.name: KUNDE_KOMMUNE
columns.description: Commuinne where the customer is located (01.07.2016)

columns.name: PRODUCTVISMA
columns.description: Detailed product information in Visma system, possibly a foreign key to another table with products

columns.name: FAKTURANRKOD
columns.description: Code related to invoice generation (01.07.2016)
